# NAICS 492110 — Courier & Express Delivery Sub Tracker
NAICS: 492110 — Couriers and Express Delivery Services
H&C Use Case: Lab/medical/pharmacy specimen courier for VA and federal medical facilities
Last updated: 2026-06-02 | Source: Web research

---

## TWO-TIER SUB STRATEGY

**Tier 1 — Execution Subs (NOT SAM/government registered — PREFERRED)**
H&C's value proposition: "We win government contracts you can never access. You do the work in your local area. We pay you Net 30 — guaranteed government money."
- They cannot bid on SDVOSB set-asides directly
- H&C has maximum leverage — we open a revenue channel they don't have
- They focus on execution; H&C handles compliance, billing, past performance

**Tier 2 — Consulting / Coaching Clients (SAM registered, not winning)**
H&C's value proposition: "You're registered but not winning because you don't have SDVOSB/HUBZone certs. We have both. Buy our GROWTH ($297/mo) or PRIME READY ($797/mo) plan — we'll get you into contracts and show you how to prime your own."
- These become subscription revenue for hcprelog.com
- May also sub on immediate bids while they build their own capability
- Long-term: they become self-sufficient govcon operators (H&C alumni)

---

## SUB OUTREACH SCRIPT — NAICS 492110

**Phone opening:**
> "Hi [Name], my name is Dennis Hunter, I'm President of H&C Precise Logistics — we're an SDVOSB and HUBZone certified federal contractor based in Durham, NC. I'm reaching out because we just identified a VA hospital contract for lab courier services in [city]. It's set aside for veteran-owned businesses — we win it, you run the routes in your area, we pay you Net 30. I wanted to see if you'd have 15 minutes to talk about it."

**Email subject line options:**
- "VA Hospital Courier Contract — Partnership Opportunity in [City]"
- "Federal Contract Revenue Opportunity — [City] Area"
- "Government Courier Contract — Looking for Local Execution Partner"

**Key objections & responses:**
- "We don't do government work" → "You don't need to — that's our job. You just run the routes like you always do."
- "We're too small" → "That's exactly why this works. We handle the compliance and billing. You focus on the delivery."
- "We need to think about it" → "The deadline is [date]. Can we talk this week? I just need 15 minutes."

**Tier 2 pivot (if they say they're already SAM registered):**
> "That's great — you're ahead of most companies. The challenge is winning the SDVOSB and HUBZone set-asides without those certifications. That's where we can help. Have you looked at teaming agreements? I'd love to show you how we structure those."

## NOTES
- VA lab courier contracts are typically $75K–$250K/year recurring
- These contracts renew — one good sub relationship = years of repeat revenue
- Sub outreach requires approval: /ops/sops/HC-SOP-001-bid-and-vendor-sourcing.md § Step 5
- Never disclose H&C markup to subs
- Help Tier 1 subs get SAM registered once relationship is established
